request_lines: Oh, a new witch in Mapleton!
Could you spare a Calming Tea? It has been a long week.
I can pay 18 gold for one.
success_lines: This smells wonderful. Thank you, witch.
Here is your 18 gold. I will be back.
fail_lines: No Calming Tea brewed yet? That is alright.
Come find me once you have made some.
